Tests for the `toFixed` method on `Number.prototype` with various arguments and scenarios.


## Files
- **[15.07.04.05-001.js](15.07.04.05-001.js.md)**: Tests the default behavior of the `toFixed` method on `Number.prototype`.
- **[15.07.04.05-002.js](15.07.04.05-002.js.md)**: Tests the `toFixed` method of `Number.prototype` for a specific case.
- **[15.07.04.05-003.js](15.07.04.05-003.js.md)**: Tests the `toFixed` method of `Number.prototype` for correct string conversion with one decimal place.
- **[15.07.04.05-004.js](15.07.04.05-004.js.md)**: Tests the `toFixed` method of `Number.prototype` with a non-integer argument.
- **[15.07.04.05-005.js](15.07.04.05-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Number.prototype.toFixed with a non-integer argument.
- **[15.07.04.05-006.js](15.07.04.05-006.js.md)**: Tests the `toFixed` method of `Number.prototype` with a string argument.
- **[15.07.04.05-007.js](15.07.04.05-007.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Number.prototype.toFixed with NaN as an argument.
- **[15.07.04.05-008.js](15.07.04.05-008.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of `Number.prototype.toFixed` when given a non-numeric string argument.
